prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity — computed result.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui functions from DFT single-point charge differences using **tier `standard` = B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (`--method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`; exact four-center PySCF integrals, no density fitting flag used), **gas phase** (`solvent: null`), parent **charge 0, multiplicity 1**. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; no geometry relaxation was reported by this Fukui task. Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). The N−1 cation state used charge +1, multiplicity 2; the N+1 anion state used charge −1, multiplicity 2. Software/backend reported by chemkit: `program: dft` with PySCF Mulliken charges; software version was not included in the returned result.

**Headline result:** the most electrophilic site by `f+` is **atom 5 (C)** with **f+ = 1.9242931**. The most nucleophilic site by `f−` is also **atom 5 (C)** with **f− = 0.1616371**.

Per-atom Fukui results, in XYZ atom order:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |
| 2 | C | 1.2286866 | 0.089103093 | 0.65889484 | 1.1395835 |
| 3 | C | 1.2270264 | 0.089304821 | 0.65816562 | 1.1377216 |
| 4 | C | 1.9233053 | 0.161527 | 1.0424161 | 1.7617783 |
| 5 | C | 1.9242931 | 0.1616371 | 1.0429651 | 1.762656 |
| 6 | H | -1.2190639 | 0.10248412 | -0.55828991 | -1.3215481 |
| 7 | H | -1.2191056 | 0.1025135 | -0.55829603 | -1.321619 |
| 8 | H | -0.76678308 | 0.10481615 | -0.33098346 | -0.87159923 |
| 9 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097397 | -0.87153325 |

**Integrity/convergence/caveats:** chemkit returned `integrity.trustworthy: true` and `integrity.status: ok`. The returned integrity checks were: `fukui_charge_conservation_f+` ok, sum(f+) = 1.0000; `fukui_charge_conservation_f-` ok, sum(f-) = 1.0000; `schema_header` ok. No `warnings` array entries were returned by the tool; therefore no warnings were reported. An explicit SCF `converged` field was not included in the returned Fukui JSON, so I am not inventing one.

**Reproducibility artifacts:** exact chemkit command returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8fxy326p/live.json`. Result JSON path from the command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8fxy326p/live.json`. Plot path returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-183004_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The returned JSON did not include the live `.out` log path, so I cannot honestly name a specific `.out` file without guessing.
